subject: Old - English
note: Practice feed me correct answer nahi hota; jaha ID important-questions se match hua waha answer bhara hai (answer_source).

questions.question_text:

Neeraj is the ________ boy of our class.
This story is ________ than that.
My car was ________ new as yours.
Amitabh Bachchan is the ________ popular bollywood star.
The colour of my shirt is brighter than that of ________.
Successful is for success, ________ is for Honesty.

Find the part of the sentence which has an error:
This is the more difficult question. I have ever solved.

Find the part of the sentence which has an error:
His friends are rich than mine.

Find the part of the sentence which has an error:
He has a few milk in his glass.

Find the part of the sentence which has an error:
Ours history teacher does not beat any student during her period.

Find the part of the sentence which has an error:
Rekha is not so cleverer as her sister.
The actor's latest performance is ________ her past one.
questions.solution: 'superior to' is the most appropriate alternative for the given blank.

questions.question_text: ________ money she had, was also spent on medicines.
questions.solution:
'The little' is the correct alternative for the given blank.

The little means not much but all.

questions.question_text: On our way back home we stopped at the mini mart to pick up ________ fruit.
questions.solution: The word 'some' makes the sentence grammatically correct and contextually meaningful.

questions.question_text: Mumbai and Delhi are two of the ________ airports in India.
questions.solution: Article 'the' is used with superlative form of adjective. Hence, busiest is the correct filler.

questions.question_text: My sister is ________ than I am.
questions.solution: In the given sentence, there is a comparison between 'sister' and 'I'. Therefore, comparative form of adjective 'stronger' would be used, since, stronger is the comparative adjective.

questions.question_text:
Which option can replace the underlined words?
The minister was accused of indulging in nepotism.

Choose the most suitable determiner for the given sentence:
The police are looking for ________ evidence to prosecute him.
questions.solution: The police are looking for more evidence to prosecute him.

questions.question_text:
Choose the correct form of adjective for the given sentence:
You look very pale, are you ________?
questions.solution: You look very pale, are you ill?
